member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.FatalAttribute
member.summary: When applied to a guard method. if it fails with anything other than causes a full crash of the application

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.GuardClassAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a guard class

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.GuardClassAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Applied to a guard class

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.GlobalSetupAttribute
member.summary: This attribute should be applied to the global setup method and is ran before any guard class is executed

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.GlobalTeardownAttribute
member.summary: Apply to the method that does the global teardown and is executed after all guard classes have ran to completion. successful or not

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.GuardSetupAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a static method in the guard class and runs before any test within thr guard class runs

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.BeforeEachAttribute
member.summary: Applied to an instance method in the guard class and runs before each individual test within the guard class

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.AfterEachAttribute
member.summary: Applied to an instance method in the guard class and runs after each individual test within the guard class

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.GuardTeardownAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a static method in the guard class that runs after all guard clauses have ran, whether they were successful or not

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.GuardAttribute
member.summary: Defines a guard method in a guard class. Severity defaults to

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueNotNullException
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be null, but it was not.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueNotNullException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be null, but it was not.

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueNullException
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to not be null, but it was.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueNullException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to not be null, but it was.

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueFalseException
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be true, but it was false.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueFalseException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be true, but it was false.

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueTrueException
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be false, but it was true.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueTrueException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be false, but it was true.

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueGreaterThanException
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be greater than a specified value, but it was not.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueGreaterThanException.#ctor(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be greater than a specified value, but it was not.

member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be greater than or equal toa specified value, but it was not.

member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be less than or equal to a specified value, but it was not.

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueEmptyException
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be empty (e.g., an empty string or collection), but it was not.

member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected to be empty (e.g., an empty string or collection), but it was not.

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueNotEmptyException
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected the have contents (e.g., a string or collection), but it was empty.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Exceptions.ValueNotEmptyException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Thrown by chains when a value is expected the have contents (e.g., a string or collection), but it was empty.

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.Expectation
member.summary: An expectation for a value

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.Expectation.WhenCalled(System.Object[])
member.summary:
Assumes the expected item is a Delegate reference and returns a for it.
Throws if the item is not a delegate.
member.param: The arguments for the method to call

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.Expectation.Null
member.summary: Expects the value to be null

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.Expectation.True
member.summary: Expects the value to be a and

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.Expectation.False
member.summary: Expects the value to be a and

member.summary: Expects the value to be equal to .

member.summary: Expects the value to be greater than .

member.summary: Expects the value to be less than .

member.summary: Expects the value to be in the range of and .

member.summary: Expects the value to be empty.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.Expectation.Contains(System.Object)
member.summary: Expects the value to contain the specified .

member.summary: Expects the value to be of the specified .

member.summary: Expects the value to be of the specified .

member.summary: Expects the value to be assignable to the specified .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.Expectation.Matches(System.String)
member.summary: Expects the value to match the specified Regex .

member.name: P:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.MethodExpectation.Not
member.summary: A negative version of this expectation.

member.name: P:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.MethodExpectation.ThatReturnValue
member.summary:
An for the return value of the method when it is called.
Calls Not.ToThrowAny() before returning the expectation, so it is safe to chain.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.MethodExpectation.ToThrow``1
member.summary: Expects the method to have thrown an exception of type .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.MethodExpectation.ToThrowAny
member.summary: Expects the method to have thrown any exception.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.MethodExpectation.ToReturn(System.Object)
member.summary: Expects the method to return the specified value.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.MethodExpectation.ToCompleteWithin(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Expects the method to complete within the given

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.MethodExpectation.ToCompleteWithin(System.Int64)
member.summary: Expects the method to complete within the given number of milliseconds.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.MethodExpectation.And
member.summary: Returns the same reference, allowing for more readable chaining of expectations. not required for chaining.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.Null
member.summary: Expects the value to be not null

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.True
member.summary: Expects the value to be a and

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.False
member.summary: Expects the value to be a and

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.EqualTo(System.Object)
member.summary: Expects the value to be not equal to .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.GreaterThan(System.IComparable)
member.summary: Expects the value to not be greater than .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.LessThan(System.IComparable)
member.summary: Expects the value to not be less than .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.InRange(System.IComparable,System.IComparable)
member.summary: Expects the value to not be in range of and .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.Empty
member.summary: Expects the value to not be empty.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.Contains(System.Object)
member.summary: Expects the value to not contain .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.OfType(System.Type)
member.summary: Expects the value to not be of the specified .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.AssignableTo(System.Type)
member.summary: Expects the value to not be assignable to the specified .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedExpectation.Matches(System.String)
member.summary: Expects the value to not match the specified Regex .

member.name: P:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedMethodExpectation.Not
member.summary: A non-negated version of this expectation.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedMethodExpectation.ToThrow``1
member.summary: Expects the method to not throw an exception of type . allows other exceptions to be thrown.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedMethodExpectation.ToThrowAny
member.summary: Expects the method to not throw any exception.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedMethodExpectation.ToCompleteWithin(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Expects the method to take longer than to execute.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Expectations.NegatedMethodExpectation.ToReturn(System.Object)
member.summary: Expects the return value of the method to be not equal to

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Forge
member.summary: A class used in guard methods to set rules for data.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Forge.Expect``1(``0,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Construct an expectation model for the provided
member.param: The value that is expected to be something

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.ForgeGuard
member.summary: The main class for ForgeGuard operations.

member.name: P:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.ForgeGuard.IncludeColorInMessageFormat
member.summary: Whether the messages should include ANSI color codes for better readability for text renderers that support it. (such as terminals)

member.name: P:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.ForgeGuard.ReBrowseAssembliesForGuards
member.summary: Whether the system should reindex the assemblies for guard classes on each run of .

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.ForgeGuard.IndexGuards
member.summary: Scans the loaded assemblies for guard classes

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.ForgeGuard.Run(System.IO.Stream,System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: Runs all the guards found in all the currently loaded assemblies
member.param: The stream where all guards that did not return have their error code sent to. For a full diagnostics, including healthy ones. use
member.returns: a summary result object of all the guards than ran. assuming no guards marked with failed.

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.ForgeGuard.Format(System.String,WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Severity)
member.summary: relies on

member.name: M:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.ForgeGuard.Format(System.String,WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Severity,System.Boolean)
member.summary: does not rely on but instead takes a parameter to determine whether to include color codes or not.

member.name: T:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Severity
member.summary: The severity of a guard

member.name: F:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Severity.Healthy
member.summary: No issues found for this guard.

member.name: F:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Severity.Info
member.summary: There are minor issues with this guard, minor enough to be trivial. the application should be able to fix them on its own.

member.name: F:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Severity.Minor
member.summary: There are issues with this guard, but they are not critical. the application may still have issues fixing them on its own, but wont cause a crash.

member.name: F:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Severity.Major
member.summary: There are critical issues with this guard, the application may not be able to fix them on its own.

member.name: F:WinterRose.ForgeGuardChecks.Severity.Catastrophic
member.summary: There are catastrophic issues with this guard, the application is likely to crash or become unusable.
